title: Frl3
compiled_truth: Frl3 is an external contact at [PG&E](companies/pge). Over the corpus period (1999-09-24 to 2001-07-31), Frl3 sent 17 and received 52 emails, totalling 69 interactions. Top correspondents: [Askaff](people/askaff-energy-law-group) (16), [Bcope](people/bcope-ci) (16), [Bcragg](people/bcragg-gmssr) (16), [Bradylaw](people/bradylaw-pacbell) (16), [Burkee](people/burkee-cts) (16).
